creator: vezhlys@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227987
rdcphy.c and miidevs patch

rdcphy(4) currently has only model 0x0003 defined, thus generic phy driver is attached instead of rdcphy one on newer SoCs which may have 0x0005 (on DX2, DX3, EX based systems) or 0x0006 model (I have one EX2 based system with this model). Please add 0x0005 and 0x0006 to the list. Patch is attached. Thank you.
